creator: dgilbert@velocet.ca
text:
In the XFree86-4 port as installed by distribution CDROMs, there are
a number of patch files that have been deleted from the cvs tree
without being put in the attic.  Even with "*default delete" turned
on in my supfile, patch-1 is not deleted and causes the XFree86-4
port build to fail.

Fix: 

I would assume this would be fixed by putting patch-1 (among other
missing patch files) into the attic.
How-To-Repeat: 
Install 4.2-RELEASE from CDROM distribution

cvsup to 4.2-STABLE

attempt to make the XFree86-4 port
